title: 5-Day Budget Goa Trip
description: Perfect 5 days in Goa with beaches, culture, and food. Includes Baga Beach, Old Goa churches, and local cuisine. Includes 3-star accommodation.

title: Luxury 7-Day Goa Experience
description: High-end Goa itinerary with 5-star resorts, adventure activities and fine dining. Includes water sports, spa and sunset cruises.

title: 4-Day Manali Adventure
description: Adventure-focused trip with trekking, paragliding, and camping. Includes visits to Rohtang Pass and local villages.

title: 6-Day Bali Paradise
description: Comprehensive Bali experience with beaches, temples, rice paddies and nightlife. Perfect for first-time visitors.
